title: CatBoost lower learning rate longer training
summary: Lower CatBoost learning rate while increasing iterations with early stopping unchanged.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. For CatBoost only, reduce learning_rate and increase iterations proportionally while preserving early stopping and validation folds. Keep the RealMLP core and final blend weight unchanged.
expected_effect: Improve CatBoost correction smoothness without changing its role.
risk: Longer training may cost time and still not improve ranking.
